_about: Spectral Stretch — bell/metallic transformation via the phase vocoder. sndfile~ (auto-loads sounds/tonal/drone.wav) -> spec.stretch~ -> reverb~ -> dac~, with a scope. spec.stretch~ stretches the spacing of the partials on the frequency axis (the 'stretch' box, modulatable): 1.0 is untouched, >1 spreads the partials into inharmonic bell-like tones, <1 compresses them. This is a SPECTRAL stretch (time/duration is unchanged) — for time-stretch use the granular tstretch~. Start Audio, then Play. Try a vocal or tonal source and sweep stretch.
